content.en:
The Wind King's Small Realm.

Ye Tian used the Black Wind Domain Realm Technique to descend here and met the legendary bloody general.

The bloody general was dressed in a blood-colored robe, and there was blood flowing on it, as if it would not be extinguished for hundreds of millions of years.

Ye Tian didn't think that an invincible figure like the Blood Demon General would not be able to remove the blood from the battle robe, so he must have deliberately not done so.

He felt a pure Dao power aura from this blood, and it was the blood of a Dao Ancestor.

Ye Tian guessed that the bloody general was estimated to have killed a powerful Dao Ancestor, and this battle robe soaked in the blood of the Dao Ancestor was a kind of glory for him.

It's like some generals on earth in ancient times who were injured, and that injury is a proof of battle honor, not a wound.

"I've seen the bloody general!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"The Lord of the Nine Poles Peak is polite, sit!" With a wave of General Blood's hand, a large hall was completed, and two seats appeared under the two of them, and a round table appeared in front of them, which was filled with all kinds of rare spirit fruits.

"Let's get down to business, I want you to become a general in Black Wind Mountain, there are only a few dozen generals in Black Wind Mountain at present, and there are still a lot of gaps between the 108 generals of the consummation, and you have been promoted to become a Supreme True Ancestor, and you are qualified to become a general!" said the Bloody General.

"General Blood, if I am a general, what do I need to do?Also, is there any difference between a general and a peak master?" Ye Tian asked.

The bloody general laughed and said, "The Nine Extremes Peak Lord speaks very directly, and he doesn't know much about the position of a general, but the other peak masters all want to become a general very much, but they are not qualified to become a general. First of all, once you become a general, you can immediately obtain the inheritance of the three middle thousand dao techniques. Moreover, the classics and inheritances that the general can browse far surpass those of the peak master. In addition, the general has the control of at least one space in the small realm! In this space, you can establish your own foundation and cultivate the talents under your command, except for the Ten Kings, no one is qualified to enter your space, not even the Heavenly King. Moreover, once you become a general, you can get the promotion of Dao Ancestor and more secrets, these secrets are very precious, and the peak master is not qualified to touch them! As for what you need to do after becoming a general? You don't have to do anything for the time being, but there is a force to deal with Black Wind Mountain, and the general needs to take action. Moreover, once you become a general, you are not allowed to hold a high-level position in other forces above the Middle Triple Heaven in the future, and you are not allowed to become the suzerain or leader of other forces. After all, the general is also the high-level of our Black Wind Mountain, no matter how loose the Black Wind Mountain is, it can't recruit the suzerain, leader, or high-level of other forces, otherwise there is no way to handle the relationship with other forces. "

Regarding what General Bloody said about not being able to become a high-level, sect leader or leader of other forces above the Triple Heavens, Ye Tian also agreed.

For example, he has become a high-level of the Void Sky Pulse and holds great power, if the Void Heaven Pulse offends Black Wind Mountain, what should he do as the general of Black Wind Mountain?

If you are not at the top, then the impact is not great.

From the current point of view, the Void Heaven One Pulse is not very helpful to Ye Tian, but his master is the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, and the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor takes great care of Ye Tian, so he helps the Void Heaven One Pulse so much.

But once he becomes a Dao Ancestor in the future, it will be impossible to continue to stay in the Void Heaven Pulse because after all, the Void Heaven Pulse cannot improve his strength.

Moreover, his true foundation is the human race, not the void lineage.

So.

"I'm willing to be a general!"

Ye Tiandao.

He believed that the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor would also support his approach and would not oppose it.

"Very good!" General Bloody nodded with satisfaction, if Ye Tian was unwilling to give up the rights of the top of the Void Heaven lineage, then he could only let Ye Tian continue to serve as the peak master, and would not let him become a general.

After all, the generals of Black Wind Mountain know too many secrets, and they must be internal personnel and core personnel.

Ye Tian originally thought that becoming a general would need to be assessed, but he didn't expect that General Bloody would directly make him a general.

However, Ye Tian needed to make an oath not to betray Black Wind Mountain, and not to serve as a high-level, sect master, or leader of other forces above the Middle Triple Heavens.

Ye Tian made not an ordinary oath, but a natal oath, once violated, it would be impossible to cultivate an inch, and at worst it would fall and die.

Of course.

The oath is not unbreakable, if it becomes the strongest true ancestor and the invincible true ancestor in the future, the oath is useless.

That kind of existence is not binding by oath!

They have almost jumped out of the rules and are real powerhouses!

After becoming a general of Black Wind Mountain, General Bloody took Ye Tian to a special space in the Black Wind Small Realm.

Here, Ye Tian saw a small library pavilion, but the library pavilion here is not simple, although there are few books, but each classic book is actually inscribed by using the leaf of the avenue, the supreme treasure of the Dao, and the information recorded is extremely important, some information is not even tolerated by the rules, jade slips and even ordinary books and stone tablets cannot be recorded, and can only be used to carry information with the leaf of the avenue.

"This book contains the secrets of the promotion of Dao Ancestor, you must browse it!"

The bloody general casually picked up a book and handed it to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian took it and browsed it carefully, and was immediately shocked.

That's right, General Bloody is right, this book does record the secret of promoting Dao Ancestor, and it is a great secret, he has never heard of it before.

There are several ways to get promoted.

The first is to use the ancestral monument to promote the Dao Ancestor, this is the worst Dao Ancestor, it is a pseudo Dao Ancestor, and the future achievements are one or two Dao Ancestors, and it is even difficult to advance an inch.

The second is slightly better, and it is to use some treasures with few side effects to forcibly merge the way.

The third is to use the Convergence Dao Treasure to Join the Dao, which is also the method chosen by many Dao Ancestors in the Divine Heaven Realm, and there are almost no sequelae and defects.

However, what Ye Tian saw in this classic was that once he used the Merge Dao treasure to merge with the Dao, he was closely connected with the rules of the realm, and it was difficult to get rid of the rules of the realm and jump out of the rules.

Of course, for true ancestors who can't be promoted to the strongest Dao Ancestor, this doesn't matter at all, but the geniuses who are confident that they are promoted to the Supreme Dao Ancestor are definitely not allowed to use the Merge Dao Treasure to advance, and they can't be used at all.

The fourth way to promote Dao Ancestor is to rely on oneself to merge with the Dao, without the help of any external objects, for example, Ye Tian has already completed the unity of essence and spirit, so naturally he can easily merge with the Dao without the help of foreign objects.

However, there is also a fifth method of union that is also recorded above, and it is the best way to join the path -

"Use the power of the Dark Forbidden to join the way!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

This method is crazy, and true ancestors who have not mastered the forbidden power at the True Ancestor level can also use this method to join the way.

The way to do this is to enter the Dark Forbidden Domain, and then perform a special secret technique of merging the Dao, absorbing the power of the Dark Taboo to forcibly unite one's own essence and spirit, and contaminate a trace of the power of the Dark Taboo.

This method doesn't seem to be useful, but after being contaminated with a trace of dark forbidden power, when it hits the Supreme True Ancestor in the future, it can at least increase the chance of thirty percent.

After all, to become a Supreme True Ancestor, one must master the power of the Dark Taboo, but he has already been contaminated with the aura of the power of the Dark Taboo, and it is much easier to completely master the power of the Dark Taboo.

But if you have mastered the power of the Dark Taboo in advance, and then use the power of the Dark Taboo to merge with the Dao, the Forbidden Body will greatly improve, and there is still hope to master the taboo rules!

The taboo rules override all the rules, and once they are mastered, not only will the bottleneck of becoming a supreme Dao Ancestor be gone, but there is even a great hope of being promoted to an invincible true ancestor.

Of course, the most precious thing is the forbidden power of the secret method!

"You want that secret method of merging, don't you?"

Seeing that Ye Tian had finished reading it, the bloody general said with a smile.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"That secret method is very precious, it is one of the foundations of the Black Wind Mountain, naturally it will not be granted to you easily, and I don't have it at the moment, it must be granted by the living Six Kings personally. But the six kings were still asleep, and occasionally they woke up a wisp of consciousness. Unless you are promoted to the Invincible True Ancestor, you will have the right to awaken a wisp of consciousness of the Six Kings. At the moment, you can't get the secret method of the Path!" the Bloody General explained.

After Ye Tian found out, he was not in a hurry, anyway, he was going to impact the Dao Ancestor realm, and he didn't know how long it would take!

Then, General Bloody took out another book and let Ye Tian browse it.
